pr.title: Record: 11L + Tight SWA + VE128 + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + TTT (val_bpb: 1.1231)

output.summary: 11-layer GQA transformer relies on tight SWA, shared value embeddings with LN scaling, and quantized model adaptation via post-quant test-time training.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Applies full-weight test-time training (SGD) on validation data to adapt the quantized model before final scoring.
techniques: Tight SWA averaging recent checkpoints under scale<0.2
Shared value embeddings plus LN-scaled partial RoPE in late layers
Post-quantization test-time training on validation data
